meaning: n.病人,残废者adj.有病的,残废的
examples: The trial was stopped and the results declared invalid.
People with invalid papers are deported to another country.
Margaret resides with her invalid mother in a Seattle suburb.
It is hard to believe this bedridden invalid was once a national skiing champion.
The young protagonist, Eddie, works days on a tree-cutting crew to support his ungrateful invalid mother.
